positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring glowing bioluminescent flora, including large, abstract mushroom clusters and delicate winding root systems. The central focus is a gentle, stylized fox silhouette curled in a patch of glowing moss. Utilize a deep indigo and emerald green color palette with accents of soft cyan and gold light. High contrast, clean vector illustration style, inspired by Art Nouveau and Japanese woodblock prints. The composition must be highly symmetrical and designed for seamless print repeat on apparel. Crisp lines, perfect silhouette, graphic novel aesthetic. Focus on negative space and clean edges.
